description: You are a synthetic biologist designing an engineered fast-acting insulin analog (Insulin Aspart). Perform an in silico site-directed mutagenesis on the human insulin gene (~/UGENE_Data/human_insulin_gene.gb) to introduce the P28D mutation in the B-chain. Annotate the mutated bases using a 'misc_feature' or 'variation' feature key with a 'note' qualifier set to 'P28D'. Save the resulting sequence to ~/UGENE_Data/results/insulin_aspart_mutant.gb. Create a text report at ~/UGENE_Data/results/mutagenesis_report.txt documenting the original codon, the engineered codon, and the biological purpose of this mutation. Ensure no frameshifts are introduced during the process.
